typography.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl+ font-light tracking-tighter leading-none text-primary

components.button_primary: bg-primary text-white px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-widest text-sm hover:bg-primary_hover transition-colors
components.button_outline: border border-primary text-primary px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-widest text-sm hover:bg-primary hover:text-white transition-colors
components.whatsapp_float: fixed bottom-8 right-8 bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-lg hover:scale-110 transition-transform z-50 flex items-center justify-center

hero_image.description: Aerial view of a luxury pool surrounded by palm trees, used for the main hero section

sections.name: Header
sections.description: Glassmorphism header `backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80` with deep olive text. Logo on left, nav links center, WhatsApp CTA right. Nav links: Properties, Services, Areas, About.

sections.name: Hero
sections.description: Split layout or asymmetric composition. Left side text: Overline 'Jaya Carita Bali', H1 'Discover Your Tropical Sanctuary'. Right side features the `hero_image` taking up 80vh. WhatsApp CTA button prominently featured. Light cream background.

sections.name: Marquee
sections.description: Continuous scrolling ticker using `react-fast-marquee`. Displays hot areas: Uluwatu • Canggu • Seminyak • Ubud • Pererenan • Berawa • Jimbaran • Nusa Dua • Sanur • Pecatu. Style: very slow, smooth drift, font-serif, text-primary, bg-surface_secondary, py-8, gap-24, text-2xl.

sections.name: Featured Properties
sections.description: Editorial grid layout showing the 5 top listings. Use a mix of large and small cards (e.g., bento grid). Cards have no border radius (sharp edges), image overflow hidden, and `image_hover` effect. Text is below the image with title, location, specs, and property type badge. 'Inquire' link points to WhatsApp.

sections.name: Services
sections.description: A refined bento grid or horizontal scrolling section for 5 services: Property Sales, Property Rentals, Legal Services (Notary, Contracts, Ownership), Visa Services (KITAS, Investor, Business), Property Management. Use minimalistic icons (lucide-react) and ample padding `p-12`. Background: Soft Jade or Surface Secondary.

sections.name: Hot Areas Grid
sections.description: Visual grid showing cards for Uluwatu, Canggu, Seminyak, Ubud, Pererenan, Berawa, Jimbaran, Nusa Dua, Sanur. Clean typography over subtle background colors or minimalistic imagery. Clickable cards that lead to WhatsApp inquiries.

sections.name: About / Why Choose Us
sections.description: Text-heavy editorial section. H2 'Why Trust Has Become the Most Valuable Asset in Bali Property'. Focus on local expertise, secure legalities, and premium service. Generous whitespace, perhaps a large overlapping image.

sections.name: Testimonials
sections.description: Minimalist carousel or grid of 2-3 high-end quotes from foreign investors/buyers. Serif quotes.

sections.name: FAQ
sections.description: Accordion component (Shadcn) for Visa, Legal, and Foreign Ownership questions. Clean lines, 1px bottom borders, no heavy boxes.

sections.name: Footer
sections.description: Deep primary color (`#2B3A28`) background, white text. Massive 'Let's Talk' CTA at `text-[8vw]`. Address, Phone, Email, WhatsApp link, Social links. 'Jaya Carita Bali Property'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: `yarn add react-fast-marquee lucide-react`.
Use ONLY HTML/Tailwind for structural layout and Shadcn for interactive components (Accordion for FAQ).
Enforce ultra-premium typography. Import 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Outfit' from Google Fonts in index.css.
Implement the WhatsApp CTA extensively. Use `https://wa.me/6282341854239` for all contact actions.
Ensure generous spacing: use `py-24` and `py-32` between sections to maintain the luxury editorial feel.
Images must have `object-cover` and be wrapped in containers with `overflow-hidden` to allow for the slow scale hover effect.
Do NOT use placeholder images. Rely exclusively on the provided Unsplash URLs in the media section.
All interactive elements must include `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="whatsapp-hero-cta"`).
Ensure text contrast ratios are accessible. Avoid pure black/white, use the defined color palette.
